subject: docs(claude): sync suggested implementations and AI notes from glow-props
body:
Adds three patterns from glow-props CLAUDE.md:
- HTTPS Proxy Support for Node.js Scripts (zero-dependency HTTP CONNECT tunnel)
- Mounted ref guard alternative for timer leak cleanup
- "Check build tools before building" AI note

Tags: documentation, infrastructure, patterns
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
